alerts.source: United Arab Emirates Ministry of Defence
alerts.title: UAE Air Defenses Engage Iranian Attack
alerts.description: UAE air defenses engaged Iranian ballistic missiles, cruise missiles and UAVs. Daily totals: 19 ballistic missiles, 26 UAVs detected. Cumulative statistics show 457 ballistic missiles, 19 cruise missiles, and 2038 UAVs since Iranian aggression began.

alerts.source: United Arab Emirates Ministry of Defence
alerts.title: UAE intercepts 19 ballistic missiles and 26 UAVs from Iran
alerts.description: UAE air defenses successfully engaged Iranian attack consisting of 19 ballistic missiles and 26 UAVs. Attacks resulted in 9 fatalities and 191 injuries including military personnel and civilian contractor.

alerts.source: United Arab Emirates Ministry of Defence
alerts.title: UAE Air Defenses Intercept Iranian Ballistic Missiles and Drones
alerts.description: UAE air defenses successfully intercepted 19 ballistic missiles and 26 drones launched from Iran on April 2, 2026. Since the start of Iranian attacks, UAE has intercepted 457 ballistic missiles, 19 cruise missiles, and 2038 drones. The attacks resulted in 2 military casualties and 9 civilian deaths with 191 injuries.

alerts.source: United Arab Emirates Ministry of Defence
alerts.title: UAE Air Defenses Engaging Iranian Missile and Drone Attack
alerts.description: UAE air defense systems are currently engaging ballistic missiles, cruise missiles and drones coming from Iran. Sounds heard across various areas of the country are the result of air defense operations.
